title: Fun stop
text: This is a Small gallery on the outside of Maun.  We went by taxi from our hotel. The Gallerist/Founder is lovely and welcoming.  She has some of her own work and that of others which was interesting. I bought an upcycled bottle with painted African patterns.

placeInfo.name: The Space Botswana
placeInfo.address: Shrobe Road Maun 1649, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Art in Maun
text:
Exploring Maun on a  somewhat rainy day and curious what it has to offer besides the obvious safari-activities, we found "The Space". 
The Space is a small art gallery (paintings, photo's, sculptures) in a shipping container with works from local and international artists. We were warmly welcomed and got a tour by the founders and owners who are also artists. 
The Space is great initiative, Maun deserves some art and the artists some support. Go and have a look!

placeInfo.name: The Space Botswana
placeInfo.address: Shrobe Road Maun 1649, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana
